flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Henry Ford College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Henry Ford College rose 75% between 2021 and 2024 (9.8% → 17.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Henry Ford College rose 16% between 2012 and 2015 (47.4% → 55.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Henry Ford College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.3k → $14.2k).
